Airdrop
You're not eligible for the $NUTS airdrop
$veNUTS holders enjoying the full benefits of being a member of the Thetanuts Finance community.

$veNUTS is not transferable, but can be unstaked to become liquid $NUTS at a 1:1 ratio. This unstaking period is subject to a 90-day vesting period, with early vesting subject to a penalty.

The $NUTS Season 1 Airdrop may only be claimed for a period of 1 month. After which, all $NUTS will be swept back into the Thetanuts Finance treasury.

Learn more about the airdrop here.
